messages.subject: Guest contribution: Bitcoin for Bitcoin Magazine
messages.body:
Hi,

I'm Dalia Platt, founder of The Sovereign Academy. I've created a comprehensive guide on Bitcoin that I believe would be valuable for your audience.

The guide covers:
• Bitcoin

Would you be open to a guest contribution or linking to the resource? I'm happy to customise the content for your audience.

Best,
Dalia Platt
dalia@thebitcoinadviser.com
The Sovereign Academy
